Tests if dividing zero by zero results in NaN using an assertion.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that uses an assertion to verify the behavior of the `isNaN` function in JavaScript. It checks if the result of the expression `0 / 0` is `NaN` (Not-a-Number) and confirms that `isNaN(0 / 0)` returns `true`. This test ensures that the division of zero by zero is correctly identified as `NaN` by the `isNaN` function. The script provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific mathematical operation and its expected outcome.
